props.ChoiceText: A target trusted sacred ground, and you learned how thin sanctuary becomes when power wants otherwise.
props.ChoiceBio: Broken sanctuary taught you that sacred protection bends quickly when pressure comes from above.

0.TransitionText: Because broken sanctuary taught you that sacred protection bends quickly when pressure comes from above, silence, planning, and deliberate death remained your trade.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Assassin, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because broken sanctuary taught you that sacred protection bends quickly when pressure comes from above, murder taught you how much depends on access, favor, and whispered arrangements.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Courtier, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TargetText: Someone in holy service remembers that sanctuary failed that day.

2.TargetText: Someone in holy service remembers who crossed the line between sanctuary and command.
